description: Optimized configuration for 1000-node deployment targeting >=100k tx/s, <=100ms latency

vrf_committee.note: VRF sortition reduces O(n^2) to O(k^2) per round: 25 of 100 replicas vote per view

pipelining.note: 4-phase pipeline (PREPARE/PRECOMMIT/COMMIT/DECIDE) with phase overlap yields ~1 RTT per committed block

performance_targets.rationale: 10 instances x 4096 batch x 1000/500ms timeout = 81920 tx/s baseline; with pipelining overlap and 25ms proposal interval: 10 x 4096 x 40 = 1.6M tx/s theoretical ceiling
